subject: Redesign MonitorPage layout: device search left, map center, building/floor+events right, logs bottom
description: Re-layout MonitorPage to match reference project and user request: left=device search/filter (MonitorDevicePanel), center=spatial view (MonitorSpatialView), right=building floors + events stacked vertically (MonitorBuildingFloorTree + MonitorEventsPanel), bottom=system logs (unchanged)
